source.note: Generated object asset names are best-effort semantic identifications. Runtime mappings intentionally cover only direct or defensible content matches; all other overworld object types keep procedural marker fallbacks. The active terrain prototype still uses the HoMM-style terrain grammar, with the grastl grass family overridden to the committed generated replacement trial frames under art/overworld/runtime/terrain_tiles/generated/grastl/frames_64. Other terrain families and roads remain on the local extracted reference prototype.

site_waystone_cache.fit: Waystone Cache is the closest current landmark-ish pickup for the ruined obelisk asset.

site_free_company_yard.fit: Best-effort Roadward Lodge style dwelling match.

site_riverwatch_free_company_yard.fit: Best-effort lodge/yard dwelling match for the River Pass faction-linked site.

artifact_default_sprite.fit: Generic artifact/pickup bundle until individual artifact silhouettes exist.

town_default_sprite.fit: First approved generated town placeholder for the default overworld town draw path; owner state remains indicated by a compact renderer pennant.

encounter_default_sprite.fit: First approved generated hostile camp placeholder for unresolved overworld encounters until encounter-family-specific sprites exist.
